name: Whitey Mitchell
description: American jazz bassist and TV writer/producer (1932–2009)
abstract: Gordon "Whitey" Mitchell (February 22, 1932 – January 16, 2009) was an American jazz bassist and television writer/producer. He was born in Hackensack, New Jersey.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Jazz at the Philharmonic

about_quotes.speaker: Candido Camero
about_quotes.evidence: The bassist was Whitey Mitchell... That was my first recording.
about_quotes.doc_title: Candido Camero — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jones Hank
about_quotes.evidence: For instance, there was one time where he had a bass player named Whitey Mitchell... That is the last time that he worked with Benny.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jones Hank — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
